word: The toad hopped away from her.
She got down on her knee.
The damp grass soaked through her pants.
meaning: 축축한 잔디가 그녀의 바지를 흠뻑 적셨다.

word: I just want my marble back!
meaning: 난 그냥 내 구슬을 돌려받고 싶을 뿐이야!

word: A face looked back at her.
He was about as tall as a pencil.
meaning: 그는 연필만큼 키가 컸다 (키가 연필만 했다)

word: There were no wires or strings holding him in the air.
meaning: 그를 공중에 붙잡아 둔 철사나 끈은 없었다.

word: Your world is in great danger!
